name: backthread
description: Architectural memory for AI-coded codebases — capture the "why" behind every Codex session and ask "how does X work?" without diving through PRs.

plugins.name: backthread
plugins.description: Captures the "why" of every Codex session into your Backthread "How it works" log (Stop hook), and adds the backthread MCP server (capture + query). Source code and tool I/O are redacted locally before anything leaves your machine.
